task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the correct notification template for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus web interface is visible, showing the 'Notification Rules' settings with the 'Acknowledge requester by e-mail when a new request is received' template opened in an edit view.

task_completion.description: Verify the subject line has been updated to the requested format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' input field contains the text '[Ticket $RequestId] Received - Global Corp' (or uses a valid system equivalent for the request ID variable like $WorkOrderID).

task_completion.description: Verify the emergency hotline text has been appended to the message body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body text area (or WYSIWYG editor) contains the appended text: 'For immediate assistance with critical issues, please call the Emergency Hotline at 555-0199.'

task_completion.description: Verify the notification rule is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle associated with enabling the 'Acknowledge requester by e-mail when a new request is received' rule is checked or in the 'On' position.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the notification template have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success confirmation message (e.g., 'Saved successfully') is visible, or the interface has returned to the main Notification Rules list showing the rule is active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ServiceDesk Plus web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web application in a web browser, rather than a text editor or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to update the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, curl requests, or automation scripts modifying the notification settings.

integrity.description: Verify the text was entered into the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The customized subject and body text are visible inside the standard input fields of the ServiceDesk Plus application, not just typed into a separate notepad or dummy page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target rule name must contain 'Acknowledge requester'. The subject line must contain 'Global Corp' and a valid request ID variable (e.g., $RequestId, $WorkOrderID, or $WOID). The message body must contain the hotline number '555-0199'.
